description: KISS Army HQ — tracks the band KISS and its lineup, full concert/tour history, the merchandise catalog, the 8-room KISS Hotel (rooms + bookings), and the KISS Army fan club with a monthly newsletter system

tools.name: get_dashboard
tools.description: Get the KISS empire dashboard — band size, concert counts and ticket sell-through, merch inventory value, hotel occupancy and revenue, KISS Army size and subscriber count, newsletters sent, plus upcoming concerts, room grid, fan tiers, and top countries

tools.name: book_room
tools.description: Reserve a KISS Hotel room. Validates the room is bookable, computes nights and total from the nightly rate, generates a KH-#### confirmation number, creates the booking (Reserved), and marks the room Occupied.

roomNumber.description: Room number to book (1-8). Room must be Available.

checkOut.description: Check-out date (ISO YYYY-MM-DD), must be after check-in

tools.name: checkout_booking
tools.description: Close out a hotel booking. Sets the booking to Checked Out (or Cancelled) and frees the room back to Available.

action.description: Whether to check out or cancel (defaults to checkout)

tools.name: send_newsletter
tools.description: Send the monthly newsletter to every subscribed, active KISS Army member. Creates one newsletter record per recipient, skips anyone already sent the same campaign (idempotent), and marks each Sent. Supports {{firstName}} / {{name}} placeholders in the body.

campaign.description: Campaign name, e.g. 'June 2026 Newsletter' — used to dedupe recipients

members.description: The KISS lineup — every musician who has worn a persona, current and former

Persona.hint: Stage character, e.g. The Demon, The Starchild, The Spaceman, The Catman, The Fox

Instrument.hint: Instrument and vocal role, e.g. 'Bass / Vocals'

concerts.description: Concert and tour history with venue, location, and ticket sales

Tour.hint: Tour name, e.g. 'End of the Road World Tour'

merchandise.description: The KISS merch catalog — apparel, music, accessories, and collectibles

rooms.description: The 8 themed suites of the KISS Hotel — one per persona and anthem

Room Name.hint: Themed suite name, e.g. 'The Demon Suite'

bookings.description: Guest reservations for the KISS Hotel — lifecycle: Reserved → Checked In → Checked Out

Total.hint: Total charge in dollars (nights × nightly rate, computed)

fans.description: The KISS Army fan club roster — customer signups who can opt in to the monthly newsletter

newsletters.description: Monthly newsletter send log — one record per recipient; Submitted records can trigger the SMTP send workflow

Sent At.hint: ISO timestamp the email was sent
